item.title: Version 1.139.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.139.0

  • **align share-link Go DNS defaults with DoH/DoT (parity with Swift template)**

    • The clashConvertShareLinks Go cgo function still emitted plain UDP/53 DNS in the auto-generated config when users imported share links through the Go path:

    修复: align share-link Go DNS defaults with DoH/DoT (parity with Swift template)

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.138.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.138.0

  • **upgrade generated config DNS to DoH/DoT to resolve CN domain timeout**

    • When CN domains (doubao.com, qq.com, baidu.com, etc.) are matched by GEOSITE/cn or DOMAIN-SUFFIX rules and routed DIRECT, mihomo's internal resolver was failing with 'dns resolve failed: context deadline exceeded' on networks where plain UDP/53 is throttled, filtered, or polluted.

    修复 CN domain timeout 的问题

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.137.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.137.0

  • **prioritize proxy selector in generated configs**

    • 修复: 代理相关问题

  • **support mihomo share-link conversion**

    • 支持 mihomo 相关问题

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.136.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.136.0

  • **pin speedContainerView.leading to restore menu bar speed on Catalina**

    • The speedContainerView had no leading constraint in the XIB — only trailing, top, and bottom were defined. In v1.118.0 this was fine because the NSTextField labels inside had both leading and trailing pinned to the container, so their intrinsic content size propagated upward and gave the container a non-zero width.

    修复: 菜单栏相关问题

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.135.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.135.0

  • **remove Catalina snapshot rendering to restore menu bar speed display**

    • On macOS 10.15, the snapshot rendering path introduced in v1.131.0 never worked: the StatusItemView was never added to the button's subview tree, so Auto Layout never ran and SpeedTextView's NSTextField subviews had zero frames when dataWithPDF captured them.

    移除菜单栏相关问题

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.134.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.134.0

  • **use dataWithPDF for Catalina menu bar speed rendering**

    • bitmapImageRepForCachingDisplay returns nil for offscreen views (views not attached to a window). On macOS 10.15, the StatusItemView is not added to the button's subview hierarchy, so the guard in updateImage silently returns early and no speed image is ever set.

    使用菜单栏相关问题

  • **restore valid workflow indentation**

    • 修复 restore valid workflow indentation 相关问题

  • **align website history summaries with release sections**

    • 修复: align website history summaries with release sections

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.133.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.133.0

  • **restore Catalina menu bar speed rendering**

    • 恢复菜单栏相关问题

  • **exclude Sisyphus attribution lines from generated notes**

    • 修复: exclude Sisyphus attribution lines from generated notes

  • **improve Chinese translation quality for generated notes**

    • 修复 improve Chinese translation quality for generated notes 相关问题

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.132.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.132.0

  • **restore older macOS status UI compatibility**

    • Ultraworked with [Sisyphus](https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent)

    修复: restore older macOS status UI compatibility

  • **upgrade generated compatibility configs to geosite template**

    • Ultraworked with [Sisyphus](https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent)

    upgrade generated compatibility configs to geosite template

    ---

    Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

    最低系统要求：macOS 10.14。

item.title: Version 1.122.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.122.0

Bug Fixes

  • Fix auto-update — Added Sparkle EdDSA signing key (SUPublicEDKey) required by Sparkle 2.x. This fixes the "Check for Updates" menu being greyed out and the "Unable to check for updates" error on startup.

Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

item.title: Version 1.121.0
item.description:
ClashX v1.121.0

Bug Fixes

  • Helper installation optimization — Silent fallback from SMJobBless to legacy installation when SMJobBless fails, no more blessError dialog.
  • Dashboard auto-connect — Built-in Yacd-meta dashboard now passes hostname/port/secret URL params to auto-connect to the Clash API.
  • Remove dead link — Removed obsolete Clash core 1.0.0 upgrade alert (Dreamacro wiki URL is now 404).
  • Build fix — Fixed SwiftLint build phase script quoting for paths containing spaces.

Minimum system requirement: macOS 10.14.

item.title: Version 1.120.0
item.description:
Dashboard Fix Release

This release fixes the Dashboard not available issue and improves dashboard compatibility.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed "Dashboard not available" error caused by defunct upstream repository
  • Replaced Dreamacro/clash-dashboard with MetaCubeX/Yacd-meta
  • Fixed hardcoded API port causing dashboard connection failures
  • Dashboard now auto-detects correct API URL from window.location

Improvements

  • Updated to modern Yacd-meta dashboard with better features
  • Improved dashboard installation robustness
  • Better error handling during dependency installation
